name: kite
desc: 🪁 A lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, and audit logs…
descFull: 🪁 A lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, and audit logs), and AI agents in one workspace. Not just a tool, but more like a platform.
